evidence_sentence: SAMs of double mutants were significantly larger than each single mutant (191.8 Â± 18.6 Î¼m)

evidence_sentence: fea2 mutants were insensitive to ZmCLE7

evidence_sentence: ct2 growth was insensitive only to ZmCLE7 peptide

evidence_sentence: Zmcrn was partially resistant only to ZmFCP1 peptide

evidence_sentence: Tassels with reduced branches and spikelets; ears shortened with disorganized kernel rows
notes: Bif1 heterozygote dominant GOF allele — BIF1 encoded as gene_modifier=2.0 reflecting semidominant stabilised Aux/IAA gain-of-function (Galli 2015, DOI 10.1073/pnas.1516473112): the mutant protein resists TIR1-mediated degradation, producing enhanced (not reduced) Aux/IAA repressor activity. Prior encoding as KD/KO was biologically inverted.

evidence_sentence: bif4 heterozygous similar defects to bif1

Prior encoding as KD/KO was biologically inverted.
